dataQuality.issue: CORRECTED Apr 24: A. P. Willits Apr 13 event was mingxing@innovaresip.com (internal) in that account context — not an external activation. All 28 ciwp_generated events in prod are internal @innovaresip.com accounts. New internal testers since Apr 17 baseline: antonio+massaro1, nick, danielpinto. user_login event returning 0 results in prod — may not carry environment=production property. Fix required: is_internal super property via mixpanel.register() on login + account_name on login events.
